description: Read-only local-only Workbench AI route for cockpit prompts. One-shot requests remain transient; persistent Workbench conversations use a separate deterministic local transcript-store step after a successful response.
rollback: Revert the Workbench conversation controller and this manifest amendment; the AI route returns to one-shot read-only Console behaviour while previously stored local transcript rows remain readable.
failureMode: If invalid, the loader omits this entry and the daemon records capabilityManifest.status=absent for this intent. Persistent mode reports failure unless the deterministic local transcript write completes.

action.name: workbench-chat
action.apiShape: POST /api/v1/ai/request with sourceApp=prism-spectra and intent=workbench-chat; persistent UI mode sets record=false and stores the completed visible turn separately through the local conversation store
